ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median value of houses in the area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents */,
  "median_house_age" INTEGER /* Median age of houses */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the area */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total households in the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the area */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the housing data */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovation" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Annual property tax amount */,
  "HOA_fees" REAL /* Homeowners Association fees, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city or neighborhood) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, neighborhood, suburb) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of residents */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the location */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Availability and quality of public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, contributor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the market trend */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the trend (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "median_house_value_change" REAL /* Change in median house value over the period */,
  "median_income_change" REAL /* Change in median income over the period */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the area */,
  "median_home_size" REAL /* Median home size in square feet */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "house_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing data record */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Pool, Garage) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., Yes/No, Number of vehicles) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., functional, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_house_features_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES housing_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing data record */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the area */,
  "ethnic_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnic groups in the area */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level attained by residents */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender in the area */,
  "marital_status_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of marital status in the area */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income levels in the area */,
  "employment_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employment types in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES housing_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing data record */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the property transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Sale, Lease, Auction) */,
  "seller" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the seller */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the buyer */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the real estate agent */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property at the time of transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES housing_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., Login, Data Access, Update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "default_permissions" TEXT /* Default permissions for the role when a new user is created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Price Drop, Market Trend) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
